PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT(COUNT(DISTINCT ?term) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?person p:P39 ?term .
  ?term ps:P39 wd:Q14710699 .
  ?term pq:P1291 wd:Q220578 .
  ?term pq:P740 wd:Q281 .
  ?term pq:P580 ?start .
  FILTER(YEAR(?start) >= 1952)
}
